productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Striper Tank Blue Top
description: Composition Blue and white striped boat neck top is made of 100% cotton Fit Regular Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron; do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery wrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this basic top is an off-duty staple. Perfect for layering, you can never have enough colours in this style! Wear this with skinny jeans, ballet flats or pumps to match your mood. Throw on a blazer for a more dressed up feel.
